_comment: MCP config for the Atlas ORCHESTRATOR only (the knowledge chat on the vault keyed 'atlas'). Same server as the root .mcp.json — so it carries query_atlas/query_vault — but with ATLAS_AGENT_CONTROL=1 in the child env, which flips on the agent-control tools in tools.mjs (list_agents/spawn_agent/prompt_agent/queue_agent/interrupt_agent/kill_agent/cleanup_agent). Loaded via `--mcp-config <this> --strict-mcp-config` in agent-local.mjs's ATLAS_CONTROL_LAUNCH_CMD. Paths assume the kit is checked out at /workspace (see docs/SETUP.md); adjust both if you clone elsewhere.
